Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class Taclet.TacletLabelHint

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.Taclet.TacletLabelHint
Enclosing class:
Taclet
public static class Taclet.TacletLabelHint extends Object
Instances of this class are used as hints to maintain TermLabels.

    Taclet.TacletLabelHint.TacletOperation
    Defines the possible operations a Taclet performs.

    • TacletLabelHint

      public TacletLabelHint(JTerm term)
      Constructor creating a hint indicating Taclet.TacletLabelHint.TacletOperation.REPLACE_TERM as the currently performed operation.
      Parameters:
      term - The optional replace JTerm of the taclet.

    • TacletLabelHint

      public TacletLabelHint(Taclet.TacletLabelHint labelHint, SequentFormula sequentFormula)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      labelHint - The previous Taclet.TacletLabelHint which is now specialised.
      sequentFormula - The optional SequentFormula contained in getSequent().
